verses.text: 'Except the LORD build the house, they labour in vain that build it'; without Him the watchman wakes for nothing, and anxious toil is useless, for 'he giveth his beloved sleep.' All our work depends on God. To labour without Him is fruitless, but His blessing gives rest.

'Except the LORD build the house, they labour in vain that build it'; without Him the watchman wakes for nothing, and anxious toil is useless, for 'he giveth his beloved sleep.' All our work depends on God. To labour without Him is fruitless, but His blessing gives rest.
Children are 'an heritage of the LORD,' a reward, and happy is the man whose quiver is full of them. Family is God's gift. The blessing of children, like all good, comes down from the hand of God.
